name: Invoice Automation Accelerator
description: Automates invoice processing using OCR and SAP Document AI
valueProposition: Reduce effort by 60%; Improve accuracy to 95%+
pitch: We have a pre-built accelerator using SAP Document AI to automate invoice processing. This can reduce your AP team's manual effort by 60% while achieving 95%+ accuracy — deployable in under 6 weeks.

name: Predictive Maintenance Engine
description: AI-driven predictive maintenance using IoT and ML
valueProposition: Reduce downtime by 30%; Extend asset life
pitch: Our Predictive Maintenance Engine detects failures before they happen using real-time IoT sensor data and pre-built ML models on SAP BTP — helping you reduce unplanned downtime by up to 30%.

name: Intelligent Procurement Assistant
description: AI assistant to automate sourcing and supplier selection
pitch: Our AI-powered Procurement Assistant helps identify the best suppliers faster by automating sourcing workflows in SAP Ariba — cutting your sourcing cycle by 40% and improving supplier quality.

name: Finance Close Automation Suite
description: Automates financial close and reconciliation processes
pitch: Accelerate your financial close with our pre-built automation suite that handles reconciliation and reporting — reducing close time by 50% while ensuring compliance and real-time visibility.

name: Customer Service Automation Platform
description: AI-powered customer service automation with intelligent case routing and resolution
valueProposition: Automate 40% of customer inquiries; Reduce resolution time by 35%
pitch: Our Customer Service Automation Platform intelligently routes, prioritizes, and resolves customer cases using AI — automating 40% of inquiries and cutting resolution times by 35% on SAP Service Cloud.
differentiators: Prebuilt intent models; SAP CX native integration; Multi-channel support
